sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) a lamp, a torch (see the root), Jud. 7:16 . Job 12:5, לַפִּיר בּוּו “a torch despised,” i.e. cast aside, because of its having ceased to give light; an image for a man formerly highly esteemed, but now low and despised, comp. Isa 7:4, and my note on that place, and 14:19 . Also see פִּיד.

(2) flame, Gen 15:17 Dan 10:6.
